name: Tidal Connection
uniques: [+2 Production, +2 Food, +2 Gold, +1 Faith] from every [Coast]
[+2 Production, +2 Food, +2 Gold, +1 Faith] from every [Ocean]
[All] units gain the [Tidal Connection Ability] promotion <upon turn start>

name: The Frozen Mother
uniques: [+2 Food, +4 Faith] from every [Snow]
[+2 Production, +4 Faith] from every [Tundra]
[All] units gain the [The Frozen Mother Ability] promotion <upon turn start>

name: Scorching Saint
uniques: [+7 Production, +7 Faith, +7 Science, +7 Gold] from every [Krakatoa]
[+7 Production, +7 Faith, +7 Science, +7 Culture] from every [Mount Fuji]
[+5 Gold, +5 Food, +5 Faith] from every [Desert]
[All] units gain the [Scorching Saint Ability] promotion <upon turn start>

name: God-King
uniques: [+5 Faith, +2 Gold, +2 Food, +2 Production, +2 Happiness, +2 Culture, +2 Science] from every [Palace] <before the [Modern era]>
[+10 Faith, +5 Gold, +5 Food, +5 Production, +5 Happiness, +5 Culture, +5 Science] from every [Palace] <starting from the [Modern era]>
[+5 Faith, +5 Gold, +5 Food, +5 Production, +5 Happiness, +5 Culture, +5 Science] [in all cities connected to capital] <starting from the [Modern era]>

name: Religious Diplomacy
uniques: When declaring friendship, both parties gain a [80]% boost to great person generation
Resting point for Influence with City-States following this religion [+25]
[+100]% Natural religion spread [in foreign cities]

name: Prophet's Leadership
uniques: [Great Prophet] units gain the [Prophet's Leadership I] promotion <upon turn start>
[Missionary] units gain the [Prophet's Leadership I] promotion <upon turn start>
[Great Prophet] units gain the [Prophet's Leadership II] promotion <upon turn start> <starting from the [Industrial era]>
[Missionary] units gain the [Prophet's Leadership II] promotion <upon turn start> <starting from the [Industrial era]>
[+7 Faith] <before the [Industrial era]>
[+6 Culture, +9 Faith] <starting from the [Industrial era]>
Only available <if [Civ V - Gods & Kings] is enabled>
Only available <if [RekMod] is enabled>

uniques: [+1 Production, +2 Science, +3 Gold, +4 Faith, +10 Happiness, +6 Food, +7 Culture] from every [Natural Wonder]
[+1 Food, +2 Science, +3 Production, +4 Faith, +5 Gold, +6 Culture, +7 Happiness] from every [Wonder]

name: Golden Enlightenment
uniques: [+3 Faith, +3 Happiness, +3 Gold, +3 Culture] from every [Gold Ore]
[+100]% Natural religion spread [in all cities]
[+10 Gold] [in capital]
[+5 Gold] [in capital] <after discovering [Theology]>
[+5 Gold] [in capital] <after discovering [Printing Press]>

name: Hopeful Habitability

[+4 Production, +4 Faith] from every [Snow]
[+4 Food, +4 Faith] from every [Tundra]

name: Warriors of God
uniques: [+45]% Strength <for [All] units> <when fighting in [Enemy Land] tiles>
[+55]% Strength <for [All] units> <when fighting in [Friendly Land] tiles>
[+15]% Strength <for [All] units> <when fighting in [Enemy Land] tiles> <starting from the [Renaissance era]>
[+15]% Strength <for [All] units> <when fighting in [Friendly Land] tiles> <starting from the [Renaissance era]>

uniques: Religion naturally spreads to cities [+7] tiles away
[+77]% Natural religion spread [in all cities]
[Great Prophet] units gain the [Widespread Preachers Ability] promotion <upon turn start>
[Missionary] units gain the [Widespread Preachers Ability] promotion <upon turn start>
